columns.name: appellation
columns.description: Specific officially recognized area for wine production within the broader region.

columns.name: ava_status
columns.description: Whether the region is recognized as an American Viticultural Area (AVA).

columns.name: main_location
columns.description: The primary county or state where the wine-producing area is located.

columns.name: region_name
columns.description: General or broad name of the wine-producing area.

columns.name: terroir_description
columns.description: Details about soil, climate, and topography defining the region's characteristics for viticulture.

columns.name: appellation
columns.description: Specific terroir or recognized quality region.

columns.name: drinking_window
columns.description: Suggested period when wine should be consumed for optimal experience.

columns.name: grape_variety
columns.description: Name of the grape variety used to produce the wine.

columns.name: price
columns.description: Suggested retail price of the wine.

columns.name: region
columns.description: Geographical area where the wine is produced.

columns.name: score
columns.description: Evaluation score given to the wine.

columns.name: vineyard_name
columns.description: Specific vineyard within a region where the wine's grapes are sourced.

columns.name: wine_name
columns.description: Specific name or label of the wine, alongside vintage as necessary.

columns.name: winery_name
columns.description: Name of the winery producing the wine.
